_comment: Registry OIDC relying-party config. Config-mirrored to kv _config/oidc/rp/default on deploy; oidc.rp('default') falls back to it (engine: oidc.js). Declarative so a wipe self-heals. Only the operator (is_root, per operator_prefix) may publish in v1 — resolve + discovery are public and need no session. Mirrors admin/_config/oidc/rp/default.json.
